input.command:
python3 - << 'PY' from reportlab.lib.pagesizes import letter from reportlab.lib.styles import getSampleStyleSheet, ParagraphStyle from reportlab.platypus import SimpleDocTemplate, Paragraph, Spacer, Preformatted, PageBreak from reportlab.lib.units import inch import textwrap, os docpath = '_outputs/final_report.pdf' styles = getSampleStyleSheet() styleN = styles['Normal'] styleH = styles['Heading1'] styleCode = ParagraphStyle('Code', fontName='Courier', fontSize=8, leading=10) story = [] story.append(Paragraph('Project Euler - Recent Problems Report', styleH)) story.append(Spacer(1,12)) # Read problems with open('_outputs/problems.txt','r',encoding='utf-8') as f: data = f.read() entries = data.split('\n---\n') for ent in entries: lines = ent.strip().splitlines() if not lines: continue # ID line idline = lines[0].strip() title = lines[1].strip() if len(lines)>1 else '' # find Statement start try: stmt_idx = lines.index('Statement:') except ValueError: stmt_idx = 2 # find Answer line ans_idx = None for i,l in enumerate(lines): if l.startswith('Answer:'): ans_idx = i; break stmt = '\n'.join(lines[stmt_idx+1:ans_idx]).strip() if ans_idx else '\n'.join(lines[stmt_idx+1:]).strip() answer = lines[ans_idx] if ans_idx is not None else 'Answer: N/A' note = '' if ans_idx is not None and ans_idx+1 < len(lines): if lines[ans_idx+1].startswith('Note:'): note = lines[ans_idx+1] # Add to story story.append(Paragraph(idline + ' — ' + title, styles['Heading2'])) story.append(Spacer(1,6)) # Shorten statement if long if len(stmt) > 1200: short = stmt[:800] + '\n\n(Statement shortened; full text available on Project Euler: https://projecteuler.net/problem={})'.format(idline.split(':')[1].strip()) story.append(Paragraph('Statement (shortened):', styleN)) story.append(Paragraph(short.replace('\n','
'), styleN)) else: story.append(Paragraph('Statement:', styleN)) story.append(Paragraph(stmt.replace('\n','
'), styleN)) story.append(Spacer(1,6)) # algorithm description: read from solver file top comment pid = idline.split(':')[1].strip() solver_path = f'_outputs/euler_solutions/p{pid}.py' alg = '' try: with open(solver_path,'r',encoding='utf-8') as sf: src = sf.read() # take initial comment block if src.lstrip().startswith('"""'): end = src.find('"""',3) if end!=-1: alg = src[3:end].strip() else: alg = '' else: alg = '' except Exception: alg = '' if alg: story.append(Paragraph('Algorithm description:', styleN)) story.append(Paragraph(alg.replace('\n','
'), styleN)) else: story.append(Paragraph('Algorithm description: (none)', styleN)) story.append(Spacer(1,6)) # include solver code excerpt (first 200 lines) try: with open(solver_path,'r',encoding='utf-8') as sf: code = sf.read() excerpt = '\n'.join(code.splitlines()[:200]) story.append(Paragraph('Solver (excerpt, full file at '+solver_path+')', styleN)) story.append(Preformatted(excerpt, styleCode)) except Exception: pass story.append(Spacer(1,6)) story.append(Paragraph('Computed result: '+answer + ((' — '+note) if note else ''), styleN)) story.append(Spacer(1,12)) story.append(PageBreak()) # Build PDF os.makedirs('_outputs', exist_ok=True) from reportlab.platypus import SimpleDocTemplate pdf = SimpleDocTemplate(docpath, pagesize=letter,rightMargin=36,leftMargin=36,topMargin=36,bottomMargin=36) pdf.build(story) print('WROTE', docpath) # Create zip of solver folder import zipfile zipf = '_outputs/euler_solutions.zip' with zipfile.ZipFile(zipf,'w',zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as z: for root,dirs,files in os.walk('_outputs/euler_solutions'): for file in files: z.write(os.path.join(root,file), arcname=os.path.join('euler_solutions', file)) print('WROTE', zipf) PY
